violations.text: The tile in the kitchen floor by the walk in cooler was observed broken. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The faucet on the three bay sink was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The three bay sink is lacking drain plugs to block sinks. Establishment must be able to effectively fill three bay sinks to wash, rinse, and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage and refuse area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The back inside exterior wall was observed with an excess of debris, back exterior wall must be cleaned by a professional restoration company. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
